title: Manual upstream sync (board-requested) - fire ZAI-77 playbook now
description:
# Manual sync - fire ZAI-77 playbook now

The board has asked us to bring `paperclip_fork_Enterprise/master` up to date with upstream `paperclipai/paperclip:master` **right now**, ahead of the scheduled 03:00 UTC fire of the [ZAI-77](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-77) routine. Current state per board screenshot: **1 commit ahead, 4 commits behind** upstream.

## Board directive (verbatim, translated)

> "We are not on the latest version of the code. Pull the latest Paperclip, resolve conflicts, continue working in our branch - so we don't accumulate conflicts."

The board explicitly wants **"Update branch"** (merge upstream into our master, **keeping** our 1 local commit by `vibecoder_blogger` "Sync up..."). Do **NOT** click "Discard 1 commit" - that destroys our local work.

## Execute the [ZAI-77](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-77) daily playbook on demand

Run all six steps from the parent issue description against `paperclip_fork_Enterprise/master`:

1. **Fetch upstream:** `git fetch upstream master`; capture commit range `OUR_HEAD..upstream/master` (~4 commits per board screenshot).
2. **Integrate:** merge `upstream/master` into `master` with a single merge commit. **No `Co-Authored-By:` trailers** ([AGENTS.md �5a](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-67#document-agents)). Preserve our 1 local commit.
3. **On conflict:** resolve in our branch (board explicitly authorized this - "?????? ?????????, ?????????? ???????? ? ????? ?????"). If resolution is non-trivial or touches contested logic, mark this issue `blocked` and escalate to CEO + board.
4. **Diff scope:** `git diff --name-only OUR_HEAD..master -- ui/src/**`. Skip QA + matrix steps if no UI files changed.
5. **QA scan + matrix update:** delegate child issues to [Browser Tester Agent](/ZAI/agents/browser-tester-agent) and [Localization Agent](/ZAI/agents/localization-agent) per the playbook (bounded scope = changed UI files only; matrix is additive-append only).
6. **Run summary:** post upstream commit count, UI files touched, new strings found, matrix delta size, links to QA + Localization child issues - both here and on parent [ZAI-77](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-77).

## Notes

- Sync target is now `paperclip_fork_Enterprise/master` since [ZAI-75](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-75) closed.
- This is a one-shot manual fire. The scheduled routine ([ZAI-77](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-77) cron `0 3 * * *` UTC) continues firing nightly under your ownership.
- If conflicts are too large to resolve safely, do **not** discard either side; mark blocked and bring CEO + board in.

## Acceptance

- `paperclip_fork_Enterprise/master` is current with `paperclipai/paperclip:master` (0 commits behind).
- Our local commit by `vibecoder_blogger` is preserved.
- No `Co-Authored-By:` trailers in any new commit.
- QA + Localization sub-children created (or skipped with reason if no UI diff).
- Run summary posted on this issue and on [ZAI-77](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-77).

ancestors.title: Sync Fork + update UI matrix
ancestors.description:
# Sync Fork + update UI matrix

Daily background job: pull upstream master into our fork, detect new untranslated UI strings, append findings to the translation matrix.

## Source / target

- **Upstream:** `paperclip` (origin project we forked from)
- **Our fork:** `paperclip_fork` (this repo) - primary branch `master`
- **Enterprise clone:** `paperclip_fork_Enterprise` - receives the rewritten history once `git filter-repo` migration ([ZAI-75](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-75)) lands. Sync target should be `paperclip_fork_Enterprise/master` after migration; until then, sync into `paperclip_fork/master`.

## Daily playbook (each routine fire)

1. **Fetch upstream**
   - `git fetch upstream master` and capture the new commit range `OUR_HEAD..upstream/master`.
   - If empty ? comment "no upstream changes today", close run as `done`.
2. **Integrate into our master**
   - Default: merge upstream/master into `master` with a single merge commit (no co-author trailers - see [AGENTS.md �5a](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-67#document-agents)).
   - On conflict ? abort merge, mark the run `blocked`, name CTO as the unblock owner, do NOT silently drop changes.
3. **Diff scope analysis**
   - Compute the changed UI surface: `git diff --name-only OUR_HEAD..master -- ui/src/**`.
   - Skip if no UI files changed.
4. **QA scan for new hardcoded English**
   - Delegate child issue to [QA](/ZAI/agents/browser-tester-agent) - scope = the changed UI files only (do NOT scan the whole tree; bounded scope per [feedback_localization_bounded_scope](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-67)).
   - Output: list of new English strings not wrapped in `t()` / not present in any locale namespace, with file:line citations.
5. **Update translation matrix**
   - Delegate child issue to [Localization Agent](/ZAI/agents/localization-agent) - append QA findings to `ui/src/locales/~temp/UNTRANSLATED_ENGLISH_TEXT_MAP.md` with the new file group + Russian-gap rows.
   - Commit i18n-only diff (no DOM changes - [feedback_localization_no_dom_changes](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-67)).
6. **Run summary comment**
   - Post on the fired run issue: upstream commit count merged, UI files touched, new strings found, matrix delta size, links to QA + Localization child issues.

## Acceptance criteria for the routine itself

- Fires once per day on schedule.
- Produces a run issue per fire (child of this parent).
- Run issue is `done` only when steps 1-6 completed or correctly marked `blocked` with named unblock owner.
- No `Co-Authored-By:` trailers in any commit produced (rule from [ZAI-67](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-67) / [AGENTS.md �5a](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-67)).

## Out of scope (explicitly)

- Translating the new strings - that is downstream localization work captured separately.
- Auto-merging breaking upstream changes - must escalate to CTO + CEO if upstream rewrites a major UI surface.
- Modifying the matrix format - additive append only.

## Routine config

- Schedule: `0 3 * * *` UTC (daily ~03:00 UTC / 06:00 Europe/Moscow).
- Concurrency: `skip_if_active` (one run at a time).
- Catch-up: `skip_missed`.
- Owner: [CTO](/ZAI/agents/cto). CTO delegates QA + Localization child issues per playbook.

## Related

- Source request: [ZAI-67](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-67) (board comment 2026-05-06).
- Migration prereq: [ZAI-75](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-75) - switch sync target to `paperclip_fork_Enterprise/master` once it closes.
- Matrix file: `ui/src/locales/~temp/UNTRANSLATED_ENGLISH_TEXT_MAP.md`.

project.name: Localization
project.description:
**Project Goal**

Replace hardcoded English text in UI with localization variables (react-i18next / i18next), while simultaneously ensuring support for two languages: English (en) and Russian (ru). A language switcher dropdown menu is added to the UI, designed according to the project design. The process is executed iteratively by a team of agents until all text elements are fully covered.

**Directory Structure**

```
C:\Users\vibecoder_blogger\PycharmProjects\paperclip_fork_Enterprise\ui\src\locales\
├── en\                         # Translation files — English
├── ru\                         # Translation files — Russian
└── ~temp\
    ├── PROJECT_DESIGN.md
    └── HARDCODED_ENGLISH_ELEMENTS_MAP.md

```

**Localization Library**

react-i18next / i18next — configuration and existing translations are located in: `C:\Users\vibecoder_blogger\PycharmProjects\paperclip_fork_Enterprise\ui\src\locales`

**Agent Roles**

**Developer** — localization developer: replaces hardcode with `t('key')`, maintains `en\` and `ru\` files, implements dropdown menu.

**QA** — browser tester: checks server availability at [`http://127.0.0.1:3105/`](http://127.0.0.1:3105/), searches for unreplaced English strings when Russian language is active, updates MAP file.

**Orchestrator** — monitors the last update date of MAP file; if file is updated — starts new Developer → QA cycle.

**Statuses in MAP File**

| Status         | Set By        | Meaning                                          |
| -------------- | ------------- | ------------------------------------------------ |
| TODO           | Browser agent | Found English text, needs localization           |
| DONE           | Developer     | Localization completed, awaiting QA verification |
| TODO + comment | QA            | Checked, found problem, returned to Developer    |
| QA\_OK         | QA            | Checked, everything works correctly              |

**Working Cycle (Loop)**

```
Browser agent → TODO
      ↓
Developer → DONE
      ↓
QA checks DONE
      ↓
  [not OK] → TODO + comment → Developer → DONE → QA...
  [OK]    → QA_OK

```

**Plan**

**Step 1 — Browser agent: audit of visible English elements**

* Opens [http://127.0.0.1:3105/](http://127.0.0.1:3105/), switches to Russian language.
* Goes through all available screens.
* For each found English text, records in MAP file:
  * full element text
  * HTML element
  * CSS selector
  * status TODO

**Step 2 — Developer: hardcode replacement**

* Takes records with TODO status from MAP file.
* By text, HTML element and CSS selector finds location in codebase.
* Replaces with t('key'), adds translations to en\ and ru.
* Sets status DONE.

**Step 3 — QA: DONE verification**

* Receives signal about appearance of records with DONE status in MAP file.
* First basic check: [http://127.0.0.1:3105/](http://127.0.0.1:3105/) responds and not black screen. If black screen — cycle stops, Developer fixes.
* Switches to Russian language, checks specific elements from DONE records.
* If problem — changes status back to TODO with comment on what exactly is wrong.
* If everything is correct — sets QA\_OK.

**Step 4 — Iteration**

* Browser agent again goes through all screens searching for remaining English strings.
* New strings → TODO, cycle repeats.
* Orchestrator starts new cycle with each appearance of TODO in MAP file.

**Final Verification (when all records are QA\_OK)**

* QA goes through all records with QA\_OK status — full regression run.
* Checks that previously completed localization hasn't broken during subsequent changes.
* If something broke — record returns to TODO with comment, cycle resumes.
* If everything is fine — project is considered completed.

**Completion Criterion**

All records in MAP file have QA\_OK status, final regression run is passed, server [http://127.0.0.1:3105/](http://127.0.0.1:3105/) loads stably.

issue.title: Execute localization migration into paperclip_fork_Enterprise (10 stages per ZAI-67 plan v5)
